prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含理科/物理类）最低位次依次约为2642名→5875名→6427名→5259名→4800名，整体呈后移趋势。2021年位次最优（2642名），2022–2023年大 幅后移至6000名左右，2024–2025年略有回升至4800–5259名区间，2025年基准位次约4800名；该校在内蒙古理科组招生计划：2021–2023年均为17人，2024年缩 减至14人，2025年增至19人，2026年计划20人，较2025年扩招1人（+5.26%），招生规模小幅扩大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排 名约第56名（2026年），近年排名稳定在50–56名区间，属于全国知名政法类顶尖院校；2024年声誉偏负面（内蒙古理科法学类投档线暴跌至6000–12000名区间 ），2026年声誉仍偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度总排名第6（高热），综合热度约975万，短视频平台关注度极高。2024年理科投档线暴跌事件可能对2025–2026年报考心理 产生滞后影响，部分考生可能因\"捡漏\"心理增加报考；法学为A+学科（全国顶尖），是该校唯一A-及以上学科，物理类招生专业中法学（金融双学士学位项目 ）等与法学强关联，吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度持续偏热，电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业2024年高热推荐，但法大以法学为主，工科专业较少；内蒙古2026年考生总数约154000人，按比例估算物理类考生约110788人（+32.3%），考生规模显著扩大加剧竞争；中国 政法大学位于北京，对内蒙古考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生占比约2%–3%，属跨省招生中占比中等偏低的省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年 小幅扩招5.26%、考生规模大幅增加32.3%、2024年理科投档线暴跌的滞后\"捡漏\"效应、法学A+学科持续高热等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在4800名基础上小幅后移。考生 大幅增加是主要推高竞争因素，扩招和\"捡漏\"心理部分对冲，预测最低位次约4980名，区间4480–5480名。

- 法学（北京昌平）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4480–5480名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档法学专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（≤4480名）可重点冲击法学双学位等一档专业；位次接近区间 上限（约5480名）应以三档专业保底。法大物理类招生专业较少，法学相关专业为核心竞争力，工商管理和信管专业可作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group (including science/physics category) were approximately 2642, 5875, 6427, 5259, and 4800, showing an overall backward trend. The ranking was best in 2021 (2642), significantly shifted back to around 6000 in 2022–2023, slightly recovered to the 4800–5259 range in 2024–2025, with a baseline ranking of about 4800 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Inner Mongolia: 17 students each year from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 14 in 2024, increased to 19 in 2025, and planned 20 in 2026, an increase of 1 student (+5.26%) compared to 2025, indicating a slight expansion in enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 50–56 range in recent years, belonging to nationally renowned top political science and law institutions. In 2024, reputation was negative (the admission score line for science law majors in Inner Mongolia plummeted to the 6000–12000 range), and in 2026, reputation remains negative (campus safety incidents). Douyin popularity ranks 6th overall (high heat), with comprehensive popularity of about 9.75 million, extremely high attention on short video platforms. The 2024 science admission score line crash may have a lagging effect on the 2025–2026 application psychology, with some candidates possibly increasing applications due to a "bargain hunting" mentality. Law is an A+ discipline (top nationally), the only discipline rated A- or above at the university. Among physics category enrollment majors, Law (Finance Dual Bachelor's Program) and others are strongly associated with law, offering strong appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of law majors remains consistently high. Engineering majors such as electronic information/communication and electrical engineering were highly recommended in 2024, but CUPL mainly focuses on law, with fewer engineering majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, with an estimated 110,788 physics category candidates (+32.3%), a significant increase in candidate scale intensifying competition. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Inner Mongolia candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 2%–3%, which is a moderately low proportion among cross-province enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, a slight 5.26% enrollment expansion in 2026, a significant 32.3% increase in candidate numbers, the lagging "bargain hunting" effect from the 2024 science admission score line crash, and the sustained high popularity of the A+ law discipline, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 will slightly shift back from the baseline of 4800. The large increase in candidates is the main factor driving up competition, partially offset by the enrollment expansion and "bargain hunting" psychology. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4980, with a range of 4480–5480.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law (Finance Dual Bachelor's Program)
- Law (Beijing Changping).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- International Business (Foreign-related Legal and Business Talent Cultivation Experimental Class)
- Economics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Business Administration (Forensic Accounting Direction)
- Information Management and Information Systems (BIT Joint Cultivation Data Law Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 4480–5480, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 law majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (≤4480), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as the Law Dual Bachelor's Program. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 5480), you should use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. CUPL has relatively few physics category enrollment majors, with law-related majors as the core competitiveness. Business Administration and Information Management and Information Systems majors can be considered as stable choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including liberal arts/history category) were approximately 1041 → 1115 → 634 → 1867 → 820, showing drastic fluctuations. After a significant advance to 634 in 2023, it plummeted to 1867 in 2024, then rebounded to 820 in 2025, forming a "V-shaped" trend in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of about 820 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia's liberal arts group: 21 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 26 in 2024, 30 in 2025, and planned 33 in 2026, an expansion of 3 students (+10%) compared to 2025, with three consecutive years of expansion, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities (2026), with stable rankings in the 50–56 range in recent years, belonging to nationally renowned top-tier political science and law institutions. In 2024, reputation was somewhat negative (due to the sharp drop in admission scores for science law categories in Inner Mongolia), and in 2026, reputation remains somewhat negative (due to campus safety incidents). Douyin popularity ranks 6th overall (high heat), with comprehensive popularity of about 9.75 million, extremely high attention on short video platforms. Labels like "highest temple of law" attract many candidates. Law is an A+ discipline (national top), the only discipline rated A- or above at this university, highly matching the admission majors, and strongly attractive to liberal arts group candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the law major from 2021 to 2024 remained consistently high (recommended/differentiated wait-and-see). In 2024, the law popularity index was 63.54 (differentiated wait-and-see), still a popular major overall. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase from 2025. By proportion, history category candidates are estimated at about 43,212 (+32.4%), with a notable expansion in candidate scale intensifying competition. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 2%–3% (about 30 in 2025 out of total national plan), a medium-low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the drastic fluctuations in historical rankings, a 10% enrollment expansion in 2026, a 32.4% increase in candidate scale, the sustained high popularity of the A+ law discipline, extremely high Douyin attention but somewhat negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will slightly decline from the baseline of 820. The expansion alleviates some competitive pressure, but the significant increase in candidates and high attention to law intensify competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 884, with a range of 725–1043.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 725–1043, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (≤725), one can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors like the law experimental class. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (about 1000), one should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety and strive for Tier 2 majors. The A+ law discipline has outstanding strength and is the core competitiveness of this university.
